title: Fitness Influencer in Park
promptText: Fitness influencer in park. A realistic full body portrait of a early 20s native american female fashion influencer with slim physique. Charming expression and demeanor. Wearing sporty activewear outfit with fitness / activewear style accessories. Nature Park background setting. yoga pose pose. Professional photography with soft, diffused lighting. High-resolution, sharp details, clean composition. Fashion photography aesthetic with natural, confident pose.
